videos.headline: Smith makes great grab by the sideline
videos.description: Driving late in the fourth quarter, Minnesota quarterback Mitch Leidner finds Brian Smith who makes the sweet grab down the sideline for a 23-yard gain that puts the Gophers in the red zone down seven against Iowa.
